name: sdet
description: npm workspaces monorepo: api, client, shared

scripts.build: npm run build -w @sdet/shared && npm run build -w @sdet/api && npm run build -w @sdet/client
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @sdet/shared && concurrently -n shared,api,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @sdet/shared" "npm run dev -w @sdet/api" "npm run dev -w @sdet/client"
